headline: Broke through the $3M revenue barrier.
challenge: A regional HVAC operator needed consistent lead flow and stronger local search visibility in a crowded market. Their goal: break past the $3M revenue ceiling they had plateaued at for two years.
solution: Comprehensive Google Ads campaigns with tight geo + intent targeting
Google Local Service Ads launched and managed for direct lead capture
Social presence built across Facebook and Instagram
Google Business Profile optimized for map pack visibility
footnote: 5,291 website sessions · 1,580 key events · 244 call clicks from GBP · 50,164 Instagram reach.

headline: +$1M revenue — $3M barrier broken.
challenge: A multi-location inspection company needed to scale lead generation across service areas while building authority through video content. Ad spend had flattened and conversion rate was stuck in the single digits.
solution: High-performance Facebook campaigns rebuilt from the creative up
Google Local Service Ads scaled across every service area
YouTube channel built and grown as an authority engine
Full email marketing program deployed
Local SEO and GBP tuned for map pack coverage
footnote: 2.76M Facebook impressions · 834K Facebook Ads reach · 45,169 website sessions · 411K YouTube views · 892K Instagram reach · 42,518 GBP impressions.

headline: On track for $1M in Year 1.
challenge: A newly launched recovery facility needed to stand up an online presence from scratch and generate qualified admissions. The sensitive category required careful messaging while the business needed revenue inside six months.
solution: Google Ads campaigns built around compassionate, compliance-aware messaging
Full SEO foundation laid for organic visibility
GBP optimized for local search presence
Conversion-optimized landing pages deployed at launch
footnote: 4,213 engaged sessions · 2,730 ad clicks · 1,249 organic clicks · 624 website clicks from GBP.

headline: On track to break $5M inside 12 months.
challenge: A commercial flooring company was invisible on the keywords their buyers actually searched. Organic traffic had plateaued and they were paying a premium on ads to cover the gap.
solution: Keyword research and competitive gap analysis
Aggressive on-page SEO optimization for target terms
Local SEO built for service-area dominance
Content strategy targeting high-value commercial keywords
footnote: 3.13% visibility improvement in the tracking period.

headline: 78K sessions, 3.68M search impressions.
challenge: A personal injury firm needed to compete for online visibility in one of the most expensive and saturated categories in paid search. Every top result had a national spend budget behind it.
solution: Paid search structured for tight intent and creative relevance
SEO foundation rebuilt around practice-area landing pages
Social media program for brand presence and retargeting
Content marketing engine for organic lift
